s2.ptxt: Place the compressor and magnetic clutch in a vise.
Using locking pliers, hold the magnetic clutch hub.
Remove the bolt, magnetic clutch hub, and magnetic clutch washers.

atten4.ptxt: There is no set number of magnetic clutch washers because they are used for adjustment.

s2.ptxt: Using a snap ring expander, remove the snap ring and then remove the magnetic clutch rotor.

atten3.ptxt: Take care not to damage the seal cover of the bearing when removing the snap ring.

s2.ptxt: Using a snap ring expander, remove the snap ring and magnetic clutch stator.
